restriction.fact: EcoRI recognises a palindromic sequence and cuts between G and A on both strands, producing complementary sticky ends.

pcrPhases.name: Denaturation
pcrPhases.description: Hydrogen bonds break; the DNA strands separate.

pcrPhases.name: Annealing
pcrPhases.description: Primers bind to complementary target sequences.

pcrPhases.name: Extension
pcrPhases.description: Taq polymerase extends primers to make new DNA.

plasmidHotspots.label: ori
plasmidHotspots.title: Origin of replication
plasmidHotspots.description: The start signal for plasmid copying; it influences copy number.

plasmidHotspots.label: ampR
plasmidHotspots.title: Selectable marker
plasmidHotspots.description: Helps identify transformed cells on an antibiotic plate.

plasmidHotspots.label: MCS
plasmidHotspots.title: Cloning site
plasmidHotspots.description: A designed region containing unique restriction sites.

plasmidHotspots.label: GOI
plasmidHotspots.title: Gene of interest
plasmidHotspots.description: The foreign DNA inserted to make a recombinant plasmid.
